prestazioni: Engine swap to a Jaguar XK6 inline-6 (engine code: XK6 3.4L) with a forged crankshaft from Mahle Motorsport, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and JE Pistons 9.5:1 forged pistons for high-compression reliability under forced induction

Custom-built supercharger system using a Sprintex S300-900G supercharger with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by Jaguar Heritage Racing, paired with a custom intercooler setup from Bell Intercoolers and a custom fuel system upgrade with Bosch Motorsport 044 fuel pumps and ID1000 injectors

Full custom exhaust system by Mongoose Exhausts featuring 2.5-inch mandrel-bent stainless steel tubing, custom 304 stainless steel headers with equal-length primaries, and a bespoke stainless steel muffler with a straight-through design for optimal flow and a deep, aggressive tone
estetica: Custom widebody conversion kit by Wingrove Motorsport, extending the fenders by 3 inches with hand-formed aluminum panels and riveted construction, maintaining the original XK120 silhouette while accommodating wider track and larger wheels

Handcrafted aluminum dashboard and interior trim by RS Panels, featuring a custom gauge cluster with Smiths Instruments chronometric tachometer and speedometer, paired with a Nardi steering wheel wrapped in Connolly leather

Custom paintwork by RS Coachworks using Jaguar Racing Green (code: JAG 102) with hand-painted gold pinstriping, complemented by a custom front grille with a polished aluminum mesh insert and a bespoke rear bumper with integrated dual exhaust outlets
